characters.name: 1LT Cooper Hawkes
characters.description: genderMalerelationships1LT Nathan West(squadron member)CPT Shane Vansen(squadron member)1LT Paul Wang(squadron member)1LT Vanessa Damphousse(squadron member)2LT Mike Pagodin(squadron member)LTC Tyrus Cassius "T.C." McQueen(squadron commander)Kate(sister)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorRodney RowlandfirstPilotlast...Tell Our Moms We Done Our Best1LT Cooper Hawkesis a main character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books and comic books. Cooper Hawkes was anIn Vitro, Gene Pool 16A, Batch Alpha-3439, born at the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania In Vitro Gestation Facility in 2057.[1]As an In Vitro, he was human gestated artificially in a controlled facility run by theIn Vitro Authority, one of thousands who were created to become part ofEarth'sfighting forces.[2] Although he had been treated and educated as all the other In Vitros, there was something different about him: he dared to question a Monitor during In Vitro indoctrination. It was an act that changed his life, for upon hearing that the Monitors considered him defective and that he was to be erased, Hawkes escaped the facility and plunged into the strange world of the outside.[3]

It was an act that changed his life, for upon hearing that the Monitors considered him defective and that he was to be erased, Hawkes escaped the facility and plunged into the strange world of the outside.[3]

characters.name: 1LT Esau Harriman
characters.description: genderMalerelationshipsUnknownoccupationUSMC First LieutenantactorN/AfirstSpace: Above and Beyond - The Gauntlet 1lastSpace: Above and Beyond - The Gauntlet 21LT Esau Harrimanis a character appearing in the 2-issueSpace: Above and Beyond - The Gauntletcomic book series. Esau Harriman came from a family tradition of military service, as both his mother and father served in theCorps. Harriman was deployed in theUSS SARATOGAand given a forward reconnaissance mission in theDelta Pavonisregion called The Gauntlet. TheChigshad been attacking supply convoys transiting The Gauntlet and Harriman's mission was to locate the Chigs and warn the convoys. He made one report to the SARATOGA and then went silent and was believed to be Killed in Action (KIA).[1]

characters.name: 1LT Kelly Anne Winslow
characters.description: genderFemalerelationships1LT Nathan West(squadron member)CPT Shane Vansen(squadron member)1LT Cooper Hawkes(squadron member)1LT Vanessa Damphousse(squadron member)1LT Paul Wang(squadron member)LTC Tyrus Cassius "T.C." McQueen(squadron commander)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorTasia ValenzafirstThe River of StarslastThe Angriest Angel1LT Kelly Anne Winslowis a recurring character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyond. She is portrayed by actressTasia Valenza. 1LT Winslow joined theWild Cardsas a pilot (call sign "Queen of Spades") well after the squadron had made a reputation for itself on theUSS Saratoga. Winslow brought her poise and confidence to the team and had her own notions of how things should work and moved right into the team as if she had been there as long as the others.[1]

characters.name: 1LT Nathan West
characters.description: genderMalerelationshipsKylen Celina(fiancée)Richard West(father)Anne West(mother)Neil West(brother)John West(brother)CPT Shane Vansen(squadron member)1LT Cooper Hawkes(squadron member)1LT Paul Wang(squadron member)1LT Vanessa Damphousse(squadron member)LTC Tyrus Cassius "T.C." McQueen(squadron commander)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorMorgan WeisserMichael Malota(Young Nathan)firstPilotlast...Tell Our Moms We Done Our Best1LT Nathan Westis a main character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books and comic books. He is portrayed by actorMorgan Weisser, and as a boy byMichael Malota. Nathan West grew up in New England in a rural town called Farmingville.[1] Nathan's driving desire is to reunite with Kylen. Around his neck he carries apicture tagof them together, with recorded audio of Kylen saying, "I believe in you." He believes with the strongest conviction that they will reunite. In time, the picture becomes a talisman for the Wild Cards, symbolizing the entire squadron's faith and belief in one another.[4]

characters.name: 1LT Paul Wang
characters.description: genderMalerelationships1LT Nathan West(squadron member)CPT Shane Vansen(squadron member)1LT Cooper Hawkes(squadron member)1LT Vanessa Damphousse(squadron member)LTC Tyrus Cassius "T.C." McQueen(squadron commander)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorJoel de la FuentefirstPilotlast...Tell Our Moms We Done Our Best1LT Paul Wangis a main character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books and comic books. He is portrayed by actorJoel de la Fuente. Paul grew up in poverty in his hometown of Chicago, Illinois. He joined theUnited States Marine Corpsto escape the crime, hopelessness, even the bugs that he hated from his childhood neighborhood. He was almost finished with Officer Candidate School (OCS) and Accelerated Flight Training (AFT) when news of theVesta ColonyandTellus Coloniesbeing destroyed by aliens was released and the Chig War began. Paul was assigned as a pilot (callsign “Joker”) in the USMC58th Squadron– the Wild Cards, embarked inUSS SARATOGA, a United States Navy space carrier.[1] Although he claims to have joined the USMC to be a "heartbreaker and life taker," he is actually reclusive and introspective. He tends to let loose his great sense of humor to ease stress and escape moments of self-doubt. It is with the Wildcards that he starts to gain confidence, first in tactical weapons and navigation, then in personal relationships. But Paul never quite overcomes his ingrained sense of personal failure.

characters.name: 1LT Vanessa Damphousse
characters.description: genderFemalerelationships1LT Nathan West(squadron member)CPT Shane Vansen(squadron member)1LT Cooper Hawkes(squadron member)1LT Paul Wang(squadron member)LTC Tyrus Cassius "T.C." McQueen(squadron commander)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorLanei ChapmanfirstPilotlast...Tell Our Moms We Done Our Best1LT Vanessa Damphousseis a main character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books and comic books. She is portrayed by actressLanei Chapman. Vanessa Camilla Damphousse[1]is from a well-to-do New York family and attended the California Institute of Technology where she earned a degree in Nuclear Physics. She interned during two summers at the San Onofre nuclear power plant, where her father was Chief Engineer, and went on to earn a Master's degree in Engineering.[2] Vanessa treats her squad mates and others with warmth and understanding, looking for what is good in each individual.
characters.personality_section: Vanessa treats her squad mates and others with warmth and understanding, looking for what is good in each individual.

characters.name: 1LT Vansen (Shane's Father)
characters.description: genderMalerelationships1LT Vansen(wife)Lauren Vansen (daughter)Kim Vansen (daughter)CPT Shane Vansen(daughter)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorColin HandleyfirstPilotlastThe Dark Side of the Sun1LT Vansenis a character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books and comic books. He is portrayed by actor Colin Handley. 1LT Vansen is aMarineand the father ofCPT Shane Vansen. During theSilicate War, whenSilicatesattacked the family home in U.S. Navy Housing in San Diego, California, he was killed along with hiswife, by the Silicates while their children, Shane, Kim, and Lauren were hiding in the attic.[1]

characters.name: 1LT Vansen (Shane's Mother)
characters.description: genderFemalerelationships1LT Vansen(husband)Lauren Vansen (daughter)Kim Vansen (daughter)CPT Shane Vansen(daughter)occupationUSMC First LieutenantactorRebecca RiggsfirstPilotlastThe Dark Side of the Sun1LT Vansenis a character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books and comic books. She is portrayed by actressRebecca Riggs. 1LT Marion Vansen is aMarineand the mother ofCPT Shane Vansen. During theSilicate WarwhenSilicatesattacked the family home in U.S. Navy Housing in San Diego, California, she got Shane and her sisters Lauren and Kim into their attic crawl space to hide from their attackers. She admonished Shane to keep herself and her sisters quiet in the attic. She was killed, along with herhusband, by the Silicates while the children were hiding.[1]

characters.name: 2LT Charlie Stone
characters.description: genderMalerelationships1LT Nathan West(squadron member)CPT Shane Vansen(squadron member)1LT Cooper Hawkes(squadron member)1LT Vanessa Damphousse(squadron member)1LT Paul Wang(squadron member)LTC Tyrus Cassius "T.C." McQueen(squadron commander)occupationUSMC Second LieutenantactorChristopher KirbyfirstPilotlastPilot2LT Charlie Stoneis a character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyondand the various tie-in books. He is portrayed by actorChristopher Kirby. Charlie Stone signed up for theUnited States Marine CorpsAir and Space Cavalry and was inducted in Loxley, Alabama. He was almost finished with Officer Candidate School (OCS) and Accelerated Flight Training (AFT) when news of theVesta ColonyandTellus Coloniesbeing destroyed byalienswas released and theChig Warbegan. He completed a training mission toMars, and was then assigned as a pilot in the USMC58th Squadron– the Wild Cards, embarked inUSS SARATOGA, aUnited States Navyspace carrier.[1]

characters.name: 2LT James Herrick
characters.description: genderMalerelationshipsPVT Donovan(unit member)PVT Eichler(unit member)PVT Miller(unit member)PVT Neil West(unit member)occupationUSMC Second LieutenantactorDavid BarrerafirstToy SoldierslastToy Soldiers2nd Lt James Herrickwas a character appearing inSeason 1ofSpace: Above and Beyond. He was portrayed by actorDavid Barrera. James Herrick was drafted into theUnited States Marine Corpsduring theChig Warimmediately after graduating college, was an honors graduate from OCS (Officer Candidate School) and TBS (The Basic School), and had theMilitary Occupational Specialtyof infantry. Herrick was assigned as the commanding officer of5th Force Reconin 2064, embarked aboard theUSS Saratoga.[1]
